text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki tells me that she has to face herself
if she wants to unleash all of her potential. To
that end, the two of us head off for some special
training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno meditates, searching within herself for the
answer to why she is at the mercy of her wild
emotions.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a result, she realizes her emotions stem from
an overwhelming desire to stand in the limelight.
Even now, she's seeking praise with her running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems embarrassed to be harboring such a
base impulse, but I tell her that's a part of racing.
There's nothing wrong with wanting to defeat
your opponent.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki is intent to race with her
competitive spirit unrestrained. Even with her raw
emotions laid bare, she now trusts that her
opponents won't think any less of her.
